jcr:content.jcr:title: Why AbbVie
jcr:content.description: Challenging work. Global impact. Every day.
jcr:content.title: Why AbbVie?

text.text: See what makes us a great place to work.

text_1284780704.text: Our work can—and does—have a tangible, lasting impact on millions of people. But it’s not just the results that matter. How we achieve them matters, too. Leading with purpose, we work to build a more sustainable future for generations to come. We do that by putting our expertise, resources and talent to work to make a real difference for patients, communities and our world.

quote_1661374647.quote: Everyone I work with has an absolute passion for our patients. Helping other people makes me incredibly proud to work here.

teaser.jcr:description: We believe the paths we take to achieving our breakthroughs matter. At AbbVie, every one of our 50,000 employees is a part of shaping those paths—and defining our way forward.
teaser.jcr:title: Together, we break through

text_copy.text: clinical trials currently underway in New Zealand

video_copy.description: Employees describe our culture in three words
video_copy.title: Our culture, defined by our people

title_copy_copy.jcr:title: What makes you stand out, makes you perfect for AbbVie

text.text: We value diverse perspectives, creating an inclusive culture and treating all employees with dignity and respect. When everyone can be themselves at work and when they’re treated with respect and dignity, we maximise every employee’s potential.

button.jcr:title: Learn more about life at AbbVie
button.accessibilityLabel: Learn more about life at AbbVie

title_copy_copy.jcr:title: We’ve been recognised as a great place to work

text.text: We’ve been honoured to receive some of the most prestigious ratings and recognitions in the industry, including being certified a Great Place to Work.

title_copy.jcr:title: Room to grow and space to thrive

text_copy_copy_copy.text: People do their best work when they’re at their best. That's why we empower our people to be their best selves at work and at home by rewarding them with competitive benefits, compensation and well-being programs that support their needs across each stage of their life.
Support our business goals with solutions that benefit the people we serve and make AbbVie a respected leader.

title_copy.jcr:title: You don’t just work here, you grow here

text.text: No matter your role, level or background - we want you to grow and succeed. We offer learning and development programs that empower you to advance your career and achieve your personal goals.
If you thrive as part of a diverse, collaborative team—we’re ready for you.
